sites.rationale: Materializes governed dossier/summary changes into the content repository's git history and working tree; the sole writer of managed YAML.
GitAlgerknownRepository.commit() -- the Repository port implementation that drives git.ts's commit for canonical.project.* namespaces.
SqliteRepository.commit() -- the durable current_nodes/current_edges/namespace_revisions projection for sqlite-engine namespaces.
Settled ProposalRepository port implementation backing the governed write orchestrator's own proposal bookkeeping.
Append-only operation.<trace> event ledger; UPDATE/DELETE are refused by the operation_events triggers, not just by omission.
Processor volume-cap accounting, written once per applied write inside the same governed transaction boundary.
Schema migration runner for the governed database file, applied once at composition-root startup.
DurableProposalService -- the restart-safe proposal lifecycle (propose/amend/accept/reject/expire/delete/revert) on the durable proposals tables.
SqliteUnitOfWork -- the single BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction boundary DurableProposalService's own bookkeeping runs inside.
Web-owned operation-intent ledger, same database as governed_sqlite, recording git-target accept/revert intents so a crash between commit and finalize is recoverable.
Runtime governed-boundary manifest, regenerated fresh from namespace bindings on every composition-root startup -- deterministic and disposable, never governed content itself.
Low-level KB file store, boundary-checked (checkGovernedBoundary) before every write; Phase 2 has not brought every historical Algerknown artifact under namespace governance.
KB bootstrap (init/schema scaffolding); out of namespace-governance scope, same as store.ts.
Vector index; rebuildable from governed content, never itself a governed memory namespace.
Changelog/diff cache derived from KB file history; rebuildable application state, not governed memory.
